mission.title: Install and Configure Dalec on Kubernetes
mission.description: Dalec is a project aimed at providing a declarative format for building system packages and containers with a focus on supply chain security. You would install it to produce secure packages and containers efficiently.

steps.title: Install Dalec via Docker
steps.description:
Dalec runs as a Docker buildx frontend. No separate install needed — just use Docker:
```bash
docker buildx version
```
Ensure Docker Buildx is installed (Docker Desktop includes it).

steps.title: Create a Dalec spec file
steps.description:
Create a `dalec.yml` build specification:
```bash
cat > dalec.yml << 'EOF'
name: my-package
version: 1.0.0
revision: "1"
description: My custom package
sources:
  src:
    git:
      url: https://github.com/example/repo.git
      commit: main
build:
  steps:
    - command: make build
artifacts:
  binaries:
    src/my-binary:
      dest: /usr/bin/my-binary
EOF
```

steps.title: Build a package
steps.description:
Build a .deb or .rpm package:
```bash
# Build a .deb package
docker buildx build --frontend=gateway --opt source=dalec.yml --opt target=ubuntu/jammy --output type=local,dest=./output .
```

uninstall.title: No uninstall needed
uninstall.description:
Dalec runs as a Docker frontend — no separate binary to remove:
```bash
# Just stop using it
rm dalec.yml
```

troubleshooting.title: Buildx not available
troubleshooting.description:
Ensure Docker Buildx is installed:
```bash
docker buildx version
docker buildx create --use
```

troubleshooting.title: Build fails with source errors
troubleshooting.description: Verify your source URLs and git commits are accessible from within the build container.

troubleshooting.title: Package validation errors
troubleshooting.description: Check the dalec.yml spec format at https://github.com/Azure/dalec

resolution.summary: Dalec is available as a Docker buildx frontend for building Linux packages from declarative specs.

prerequisites.description: Docker with Buildx plugin required. No Kubernetes cluster needed.
